title: Localize remaining strings on /instance/settings/adapters page (ZAI-156)
description:
Parent: ZAI-156 «доперевести».

The board reviewed http://127.0.0.1:3105/instance/settings/adapters in Russian and flagged untranslated/leftover English strings that still need to be localized across all 8 locales.

Scope:
- Walk the Adapters settings page (ui/src/pages/instance-settings/Adapters.* and any subcomponents) in all 8 locales (en, ru, de, es, pt, el, uk, zh).
- Identify every English-leaking string: page title, section headings ("External Adapters", "Built-in Adapters", "Install Adapter", "No external adapters installed", "Install an adapter package to extend model support.", the alpha banner copy, "Built-in" badge, model count suffix, the "power icon" hint, etc.).
- Wire each string through t() / i18n keys, add the keys to all 8 locale JSON bundles with proper translations.
- Verify the page renders cleanly with zero English leakage in ru (per the board screenshot) and in the other 7 locales.
- Report back with: list of keys added, files touched, and a per-locale screenshot or text dump of the page.

Acceptance: zero English leakage on /instance/settings/adapters in any of the 8 locales. Follow the round-3 standard (ZAI-138/139) — board will not approve until all locales are clean.

Work on the existing localization branch where appropriate.
